description: Very good product and solid support.
author: Patrick H.
pros: The User Interface is very simple and easy to work with. Searching through emails is also very simple. They also use a URL sandbox checker every time you open a link.
cons: Whitelisting bounce emails is rather hard to figure out.

description: We replaced the previous system due to latency problems in receiving emails. We have been using libraesva for two years and have no longer had problems with late deliveries.
author: Marco L.
pros: Very good observability. Usefull feature in troubleshooting.
cons: LDAP interface to use libraesva with onprem mail systems could be improved.

review_title: Libra esva great mail security tool
description: Very good management and great analisys.
author: Alessandro B.
pros: Continuos updates available. great support from esva teams
cons: Integration with office 355 could be improved

review_title: A very efficient, light, customizable mail protection system.
description: Many threats are perfectly blocked by the software. The job of the postmaster has been made easier. Integration with other internal services worked like a charm.
author: Roberto P.
pros: Easiness of installation and configuration, powerful interface, few resources needed to run, excellent support team.
cons: There are no important featues missing I'm aware of or I do strongly need.
author_profession: Head of ICT Systems and Services

review_title: Excellent product, great features and security and keenly priced
description: As a company, very efficient and flexible when installing and configuring the solution. Allowed to go at our pace and also the way we wanted the rollout to happen. Very little SPAM arrives these days and this without us creating lots of rules etc The system looks after itself to a great extent. Virtually no 'false positives' Issues and requests raised are dealt with very quickly Very good user acceptance, no complaints at all with the product
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to install and configure. Easy to navigate the admin console. Simple to track and act on email related issues Easy for the end user to control their own quarantine, block/whitelists from anywhere Our own instance in the cloud and this available in HA in 2 separate UK Data Centre's Excellent and efficient resolution of support requests
cons: Not much - no plugin to local installation of Outlook client - Web only Mobile Libra APP doesn't honour 365 MFA (available in beta) Restricting some features to end users within the Web App (available in beta)

description: With both deployment and support we've had great response from LibraESVA and I'd rate them highly in terms of technical support. They respond to bugfixes and feature requests in good time.
author: Craig T.
pros: Excellent integration of the URL checking service, great integration with Office 365 for both user management and tighter systems. We operate a cluster system which hasn't caused any issues in deployment in over 2 years and the spam capture rates are better than previous deployed products.
cons: While the GUI is fully useable, we do feel it could be improved (as all web front ends can be) and a few tweaks that would suit our use case however overall I couldn't say anything show stopping.

description: I've been using Libraesva Email Security since 2018 and I've found simple installation, easy to upgrade, very quick and good support and customer care and a great security improvement for a cheap price. I'm very satisfied of the product.
author: Gian Marco C.
pros: libraesva email security is a very efficient email filtering system, accurate, reliable with an extremely rare case of false positives and a quite total protection for spam, phishing and other bad mail. Excellent the customer support and care.
cons: In my opinion libraesva Email Security has no weak points: all is ok.

description: My experience with the product, which I have been using since version 4.x, has always been positive. It has helped me manage the mail flow in a safe and effective way, it allows me to manage quarantine and effectively monitor email traffic.
author: Renato B.
pros: There is not just one aspect that I like about the application, there are several, but certainly the reliability and ease of management are really great.
cons: Honestly, I can't find any negative aspects or features that I didn't like.

author: Marco M.
pros: It is advanced feautures mail security solutions with quality responsive support
cons: email security solution that do not uses API-based integration

description: Worked like a charm from day one. E-mail is a critical tool for our business: so far, that is for more than a year, the system has been running 24/7 with no outages.
author: Michele M.
pros: It works! With Libraesva we got rid of most spam, & malware gets blocked upfront. Also, the incoming email log is an useful tool that we use to 'debug' e-mail configuration issues.
cons: Not sure it is a real con, but: Libraesva has tons of config options. Getting it configured properly takes time & professional guidance.

description: Un prodotto maturo e affidabile che può ancora essere affinato
author: Claudio D.
pros: E' il prodotto maggiormente efficace nel riconoscere minacce rivolte a utenti che utilizzano principalmente la lingua italiana
cons: La non completa configurabilità dei testi inseriti neimessaggi email filtrati

author: Andrea M.
pros: Facilità di installazione e altissima percentuale di minacce rilevate, ottimo supporto clienti.
cons: Nessuno svantaggio al momento. Potrebbe soffrire con prodotti concorrenti che fanno anche altro oltre la email security

description: We wanted software that would allow us to encrypt documents. Libra ESG solved this.
author: Joel H.
pros: This provides a very good level of SPAM filtering that is customisable, as well as being easy to set up, and offering us features we didn't have on our old software. The technical support is excellent too.
cons: Nothing really. We've been using it for quite a while now and it works flawlessly.

description: Great company to deal with - highly recommend.
author: Neil S.
pros: It does what it says on the tin. Both we and our customers are very happy with the product. It adds an important and reliable layer of security to the managed security services we supply.
cons: General usability of the UI is difficult and in some cases quite confusing. It was clearly designed by a "techie"! However this is a fairly minor issue once you get used to it and something that is easily developed and resolved in the future.

description: quite impressive with good support
author: Samuel O.
pros: Dash board report and Authentication with LDAP configuration
cons: can't remember any but pain of blocking important mail stand out though it's for my good.

description: I have tried many I will stick to it
author: Steven M.
pros: Libra has a new approach to email security. It is focused around user understanding and with a very unique approach to sandboxing. the support is super efficient and very helpful
cons: might miss some global threat intelligence feeds

description: Excellent, high integrity organisation. Capable and supportive.
author: Ian K.
pros: Ease of set up. Comprehensive analysis of email security.
cons: GUI on email portal is a little 'old school'. This could be revamped.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Efficace email security e server SMTP
description: Stiamo utilizzando un appliance on-premises di LibraESva dal 2014, prima su una nostra infrastruttura virtuale e ora in un nostro Cloud. Rispetto alle soluzioni usate precedentemente abbiamo rilevato un notevole miglioramento nella percentuale di spam e minacce bloccate e una diminuzione dei falsi positivi. La configurazione e la gestione sono gestiti dal nostro settore senza bisogno di consulenza esterna.
author: Battista S.
pros: Efficacia: poche le mail di spam non intercettate, pochissimi i falsi positivi, comunque rintracciabili e sbloccabili facilmente. Semplicità: la configurazione e la gestione sono estremamente semplici, l'interfaccia è davvero intuitiva. Affidabilità: in circa 10 anni di utilizzo non abbiamo rilevato problemi di funzionamento. Supporto: nei pochi casi in cui abbiamo avuto la necessità di aprire ticket di assistenza le risposte sono state sempre veloci e risolutive.
cons: Ad ora non ho rilevato aspetti negativi, proseguite così

description: Upgrading from cisco ESA I found more efficency on spam classification and phishing prevention.
author: Simone S.
pros: Easy management and configuration. Efficency.
cons: none, no problem found at all, sorry.....

author: Marcello C.
pros: La facilità d'uso, blocca quasi tutto lo spam in arrivo. Pochi salsi positivi
cons: in realtà non ci sono lati negativi, ovviamente non blocca tutto lo spam in arrivo, ogni tanto qualche mail passa, ma credo che nessun prodotto sia efficace al 100%

author: Roberto T.
pros: Ho introdotto Libra presso l'Ente per cui lavoro a seguito di numerose esperienze positive che ho raccolto in passato in occasione dell'impiego del prodotto in contesti differenti. Anche nella situazione che mi vede coinvolto attualmente ho riscontrato un ottimo funzionamento. Consigliatissimo.
cons: non ho riscontrato aspetti negativi che meritino di essere segnalati

description: We and our customers are satisfied with Libraesva Email Security. Although the product is not still well known it brings perfect level of protection and up-to-date features for customers all sizes.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Libraesva Email Security brings highly rated email protection, simple implementation and user-friendly usage. It is the true enterprise advanced email protection for customers all sizes.
cons: We like all the features of Libraesva and appreciate effort of vendor quickly implement new features actually required by the customers and actual security standards. The implementation of the product was simple and fast.

review_title: Look no further for your email security needs
description: Overall it has been really great for us. The end users are safer and we're spending less time worrying about and dealing with BEC scams, email based attacks, and junk mail cluttering up inboxes. The support staff and sales staff have both been pleasant and extremely knowledgeable. Everything has been solid all-around.
author: Berk M.
pros: Very easy to deploy and get started with. Does a phenomenal job of thwarting threats and junk mail -- better than all other major players we've evaluated and used in the last year before finding Libraesva.
cons: This is actually one of the Pros I love about it, but I'm putting this here because I think some folks may struggle here... This solution has A LOT of options, controls, and granular settings. This is not a toy! A good understanding of how email actually works will go a very long way toward successful deployment and usage. Because this system is the real deal, you may need to invest a little time and energy into learning how to tweak it to suit your needs. Support is fantastic, so you can definitely lean on them for customizing it to your needs.

description: The software has helped reduce time going through the quarantine list since before we had a long long list of keywords and phrases that would cause a high rate of false positives. Where it would take an hour and sometimes more it only takes a few minutes now to look over the list and release what needs to be.
author: Jonathan P.
pros: Very easy to use once you get use to the interface and customize your reports so you can go through and release those emails that are held by the system. Of course you can enable the quarantine for your end users but lets just say that not all users should have that access ;-). Once you mark something as bad/good the system very quickly will learn that those email(s) are to be allowed in or not. The ability to recall messages in Office 365, Exchange or Google is a bonus. If something does get past the system and let's face it all systems will let something through once in a while, you can just select those messages from the console and have it remove the messages from the user's inboxes. The impersonation protection helps with those emails that just have the user's name in the email and not of course their email address. This helps our users who do not look at the actual email address by not allowing those emails in. There are a few false positives that you have to work through but in the end it does help. Of course the sandbox, URL inspection and attachment inspection are features that help protect your system and end users from getting those emails that sneak past the normal inspection methods like AV and hash comparisons.
cons: At the present time there is not much to say as far as Cons as the system is always being updated and improved. The team is very responsive and open to suggestions for improving the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Why we selected Libraesva to enhance our Email Security Posture
description: I would recommend that anyone looking for an Enterprise Email security solution to base decision on security and technical features and not marketing blurb and glossy pdfs.
author: Sergio M.
pros: Simple and easy to use. Great pre and post sales. We based decision on security and technical features and not marketing collateral. The post-sales support is both responsive and thorough.
cons: Integrated eLearning bite size course or alert to the end-user if they receive malicious email.
